Description: Human-edited ADS duty object rules. Lower priority wins. Zero numeric ids mean global. Use dutyEnglishName while scouting, then tighten to contentFinderConditionId or territoryTypeId later if needed. classification supports Ignored for sticky non-progression interactables, BattleNpc-only Follow for live movement anchors, and BattleNpc-only BossFight for live bosses that should beat nearby trash/objectives once in range. waitAtDestinationSeconds is included now for future execution timing.

Rules.Notes: Key object should beat the nearby Sealed Barrier.
Barrier stays below the rosary until the key is handled.
Sticky optional note remains targetable after use and should not hold planner truth.

Follow Cid as a live-only anchor only when no other live monster or interactable is present; never promote Cid as a ghost target. Follow is BattleNpc-only; migrated to Ignored to keep this object out of planner truth.
